entities.name: ICGV 87165
entities.description: An elite groundnut germplasm line developed from an interspecific cross.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT (PI 261942)
entities.description: Parent species Arachis hypogaea subsp fastigiata var fastigiata used in the cross.

entities.name: ARACHIS CARDENASII
entities.description: Parent species used in the interspecific cross to develop ICGV 87165.

entities.name: REPEATED SELECTIONS
entities.description: The process of selecting individuals over multiple generations to stabilize a line.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC POPULATION
entities.description: A cytologically unstable population resulting from the cross between A. hypogaea and A. cardenasii.

entities.name: NORTH CAROLINA STATE UNIVERSITY
entities.description: The institution that provided the interspecific population.

entities.name: USA
entities.description: The country where North Carolina State University is located.

entities.name: CS 9
entities.description: The initial designation of the stabilized line before it was renamed ICGV 87165.

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: An agronomic character used to test the performance of the stabilized line.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC CHARACTERS
entities.description: General agricultural traits used to evaluate the stabilized line.
